title: Trump urges UK and other nations to send warships to Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The US president says he hopes China, France, Japan and South Korea will also send ships to defend the key oil shipping route.
summary_public: The US president says he hopes China, France, Japan and South Korea will also send ships to defend the key oil shipping route.
